category_sources: source_facts.description says osmfilter is a command-line tool to filter OpenStreetMap files for specific tags; official OpenStreetMap Wiki page describes filtering OSM data files for tags.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osmfilter; official OpenStreetMap Wiki page is titled Osmfilter.
docs_sources: Official OpenStreetMap Wiki page documents osmfilter usage and filtering examples; official GitLab project references the Osmfilter wiki page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://gitlab.com/osm-c-tools/osmctools; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists osmfilter plus related osmconvert/osmupdate tools; official OpenStreetMap Wiki describes filtering OSM objects by tags.
